message:
fix(scanner,logger): .tmp_target pattern, shutdown sentinel, auto_vacuum conversion

4 bugs from deep audit:
- patterns.rs: add tmp-target-prefix pattern so .tmp_target_* dirs are
  classified as RustTarget (0.90) instead of falling through to generic
  dot-tmp TempDir (0.60). Remove dead has_git branch in NodeModules.
- dual.rs: shutdown() now uses blocking send() so the Shutdown sentinel
  is never silently dropped when the channel is full.
- sqlite.rs: auto_vacuum=FULL is a no-op on existing databases; now
  checks current value and runs VACUUM to convert if needed (before
  setting WAL mode, since VACUUM resets journal_mode).
- walker.rs: fix stale comment about MAX_ENTRIES_PER_DIR.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
